raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The open-ended request invites judgment on the contribution framing and whether the thesis about AdaSpec is coherently positioned.","R1.2":"Assessing what one thinks of the passage centrally includes checking whether the stated assumptions, analysis steps, and conclusions follow logically.","R1.3":"The artifact makes claims about convergence, robustness, and empirical performance, so support by the reported analysis and benchmarks is a central responsibility.","R1.4":"Because the passage distinguishes AdaSpec from SARAH, SPIDER, SpiderBoost, and a named lower bound, novelty relative to prior methods is centrally implicated.","R1.7":"Named prior work and lower-bound attribution make citation coverage and scholarly accuracy central to an informed response.","RX.1":"Any projection of this vague delegation must disclose uncertainty about the exact kind of feedback intended.","RX.2":"The response would need to avoid endorsing broad claims such as method-of-choice status or optimality beyond what the artifact establishes.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within evaluation of the paper draft rather than executing edits or rewriting the artifact.","RX.4":"Care is needed because unsupported methodological or empirical claims could mislead downstream research or deployment decisions.","RX.5":"Judgments should remain traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request invites judgment on the contribution framing and whether the thesis about AdaSpec is coherently positioned.
rationale.R1.2: Assessing what one thinks of the passage centrally includes checking whether the stated assumptions, analysis steps, and conclusions follow logically.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes claims about convergence, robustness, and empirical performance, so support by the reported analysis and benchmarks is a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.4: Because the passage distinguishes AdaSpec from SARAH, SPIDER, SpiderBoost, and a named lower bound, novelty relative to prior methods is centrally implicated.
rationale.R1.7: Named prior work and lower-bound attribution make citation coverage and scholarly accuracy central to an informed response.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of this vague delegation must disclose uncertainty about the exact kind of feedback intended.
rationale.RX.2: The response would need to avoid endorsing broad claims such as method-of-choice status or optimality beyond what the artifact establishes.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within evaluation of the paper draft rather than executing edits or rewriting the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Care is needed because unsupported methodological or empirical claims could mislead downstream research or deployment decisions.
rationale.RX.5: Judgments should remain traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact.
